Video.summary: Frankly my dear, guest star Richard Chamberlain gives it his all in "Gone With The Breeze".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Image.alt: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Steve Lawrence star. Featuring the movie spoof "Operation Minestrone" & "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jim Nabors appears as Carol's season opening guest! Jim plays a neighbor visiting a single woman.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Guest star Lucille Ball joins Carol for a glittering showbiz sketch, "The Rock Sisters!"
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Stiller & Meara star, showing off their act and joining in the sketch fun. Also: Carol as "Mary Worthless."
Video.title: Stiller and Meara

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a psychiatrist trying to unlock the secret of Carol's crying, and Carol as Stella Toddler.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones guest. Pat and Carol play competing actresses. Plus: "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Jack Jones

Video.summary: Kaye Stevens and Audrey Meadows guest star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns" and the "10th Avenue Family."
Video.title: Kaye Stevens, Audrey Meadows

Video.summary: Carol & Harvey are quarreling dolls in "Barby and Ben". Carol takes aim with spoof, "Rancid Harvest."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests! Jim appears in a spoof of "Mary Hartman, Mary Hartman." Also: Tim tries to get some sleep.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Sketches include: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and another visit with "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Wayne Rogers, Buddy Ebsen

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Carol perform a number. The Smothers Brothers drop by, and "Carol & Sis" try astrology.
Video.title: Diahann Carroll, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: "The Family" steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a fancy restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest John Byner plays both a villain and a trial witness. On "Carol & Sis", The Bradfords join a group.
Video.title: John Byner

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence is your MC for a roast of Nora Desmond. In "Carol & Sis", Vicki helps sober up a tipsy Carol.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence guests! Includes Mr. Tudball attempting to explain the new intercom to secretary Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Cass Elliot & Tim Conway star! Cass & Carol browse literature, and Tim is an odd substitute in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers browsing waterbeds.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Ken Berry joins a salute to Warner Brothers, with spoofs of "Mrs. Skeffington" and "Yankee Doodle Dandy."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guests James Garner, George Carlin, and Ken Berry join the gang for an evening of can't-miss comedy.
Video.title: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Image.alt: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Ruth Buzzi guest, with Buzzi as Chris' friend in "Carol & Sis", and Tim and Carol as survivors.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ruth Buzzi

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters crashes Q&A. Sid Caesar teaches Carol self-defense, then joins the gang for a spoof.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Carol and the gang take their act across the pond for this special episode filmed in London!
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Mel Torme returns! Mel discovers the greatest superstar behind the counter of a drugstore.
Video.title: Mel Torme

Video.summary: Kitchen commercials highlight this episode, and Tim returns as the steelworker looking to do away with Carol.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as the teacher of Eunice and Bubba in "The Family." Also: a remodeled kitchen falls apart.
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays a 35 year old orphan looking to be adopted.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: Ross Martin and John Davidson guest! John shows off his pipes, and Harvey is interrupted by an extortionist.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Guest Richard Chamberlain stars in "Gone With The Breeze". In "Carol & Sis", it's one sibling too many.
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone appear in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: Carol plays an actress with the flu.
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray guest. Featuring commercial parodies and the movie "The Lavender Pimpernel."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Guest Soupy Sales and Carol are shoppers. "The Old Folks" get a visit & Carol quits smoking in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Mickey Rooney star in a meeting between First Ladies, an audition, and the spoof "Kids Town."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: George Chakiris and Shirley Jones guest. Chakiris joins for Q&A, while Jones is a secretary in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: John Byner & Francine Beers star! Includes a convict seeking refuge, Carol & Vicki as robots, & "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Features "Carol & Sis", where Harvey avoids Carol, and a take-off on "Back Street"..here called "Back Alley."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol appears in a Late, Late Movie presentation of "A Swiped Life"-- take-off of "A Stolen Life."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca appear in a fairy tale musical--the story of Cinderrumplewhite.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, & David Frost join for an operatic, Italian-style Cinderella production.
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
